cn_example_pinyin: Rén wú yuǎnlǜ, bì yǒu jìn yōu.
cn_example_meaning: A person without foresight will have near-term worries.
meaning_shift_note: JP = reserve/hesitation/holding back. CN = long-term thinking/foresight (classical).
freq_note: Mainly used in classical proverbs

jp_example: もう少し我慢してください。
jp_example_reading: もうすこしがまんしてください。
jp_example_meaning: Please be patient a little longer.
cn_example_meaning: Arrogance is an obstacle to spiritual practice.
meaning_shift_note: JP = patience/endurance. CN = arrogance/conceit (Buddhist term), rarely used in daily speech.
freq_note: Rare; only used in Buddhist contexts in Mandarin

jp_example_reading: ともだちにそうだんする。
cn_example_meaning: We had a very enjoyable conversation.
meaning_shift_note: JP = to consult/seek advice. CN = to converse (literary, uncommon).
freq_note: Literary/classical usage; 商量 or 讨论 more common

jp_example_reading: れきしじょうのじゅうようなじんぶつ。
cn_example_pinyin: Tā shì yí gè zhòngyào rénwù.
freq_note: Very common in all contexts

jp_example_reading: じんせいはいちどきりだ。
freq_note: Very common in daily and literary contexts

jp_example_reading: せかいじゅうをりょこうしたい。
jp_example_meaning: I want to travel around the world.
freq_note: Extremely common in all contexts

jp_example_reading: しょうらいのゆめはなんですか。
jp_example_meaning: What is your dream for the future?
cn_example_meaning: In the future, I want to become a teacher.
freq_note: Very common in daily usage

jp_example_reading: かこのけいけんからまなぶ。
cn_meaning: Past; to pass by; to go over
cn_example: 过去的事就不要再提了。
cn_example_pinyin: Guòqù de shì jiù bú yào zài tí le.
cn_example_meaning: Don't bring up things from the past.
freq_note: Extremely common in all contexts

jp_example_reading: しけんきかんちゅうはいそがしい。
jp_example_meaning: I'm busy during the exam period.
cn_example_pinyin: Jiàqī qījiān wǒ qù le lǚxíng.
cn_example_meaning: I went traveling during the holiday period.
freq_note: Very common in all contexts

jp_example_reading: そのしゅんかんをわすれない。
cn_example: 就在那一瞬间，一切都变了。
cn_example_pinyin: Jiù zài nà yí shùnjiān, yíqiè dōu biàn le.
freq_note: Very common in daily and literary contexts

jp_example_reading: えいえんにわすれない。
freq_note: Very common in daily usage

jp_example: ボランティア活動に参加する。
jp_example_reading: ぼらんてぃあかつどうにさんかする。
cn_example_pinyin: Xuéxiào zǔzhī le hěn duō huódòng.
freq_note: Extremely common in all contexts

jp_example_reading: すぐにこうどうする。
freq_note: Very common in all contexts

jp_example_reading: やくそくをまもる。
cn_example_meaning: You should restrain your own behavior.
meaning_shift_note: JP = promise/appointment. CN = to restrain/restrict, not 'promise'.
freq_note: Common in formal contexts

jp_example_reading: ともだちをしょうかいする。
freq_note: Archaic; 介绍 (reversed order) is standard in modern Mandarin

jp_example_reading: あとでれんらくします。
freq_note: Common; 联系 is more frequently used in daily speech

jp_example_reading: らいねんのよさんをきめる。
freq_note: Common in business and daily contexts

jp_example: 二つの方法を比較する。
jp_example_reading: ふたつのほうほうをひかくする。
freq_note: Extremely common in daily usage

jp_example_reading: ぜったいにあきらめない。
jp_example_meaning: I will absolutely never give up.
freq_note: Very common in daily usage

jp_example_reading: そうごにたすけあう。
freq_note: Very common in formal and daily contexts

jp_example: この法律は全国に適用される。
jp_example_reading: このほうりつはぜんこくにてきようされる。
cn_meaning: To apply; applicable; suitable for use
cn_example: 这个规则不适用于这种情况。
cn_example_pinyin: Zhège guīzé bú shìyòng yú zhè zhǒng qíngkuàng.
cn_example_meaning: This rule does not apply to this situation.
freq_note: Common in formal and legal contexts

jp_example: 新しい設備を設置する。
jp_example_reading: あたらしいせつびをせっちする。
cn_meaning: To set up; to install; settings
freq_note: Very common in technology and daily contexts

jp_example_reading: こくさいてきにしょうにんされる。
cn_meaning: To admit; to acknowledge; to recognize
cn_example_pinyin: Tā chéngrèn le zìjǐ de cuòwù.
meaning_shift_note: JP = official approval/recognition. CN = to admit/acknowledge (often mistakes).
freq_note: Very common in daily and formal contexts

jp_example_reading: ふるいせいどをはいしする。
cn_meaning: To abolish; to annul; to repeal
cn_example: 这项法律已经被废止了。
cn_example_pinyin: Zhè xiàng fǎlǜ yǐjīng bèi fèizhǐ le.
freq_note: Used in formal and legal contexts
